feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: No longer you
entry.summary:
Author: Rising_moon012

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,114Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Soulmates can be the earth's best gift to those willing to accept them. Fate chooses the perfect person for you to share your life with, and offers them to you on a silver platter covered with gold leaves and jewels. She tells you exactly how to find them and who they are, and all you have to do is allow yourself to let them share that bond and gift with you: A handprint is left on you from the moment you're born. Only you can see it, showing you exactly where your one true love will touch you for the first time, and when that happens, it disappears. A kind promise of Fate, as most say. The legend prophesies a Kingdom where magic is shunned, but soulmates are sacred. Where a royal heir will become the once and future king with the help and protection of a young warlock meant for greatness and a prince who sees too much. The moment they meet, and the bond is formed, the legend begins. And nothing can, or will ever, change it. If you believe in Fate, that is.   OR Merlin and Arthur share a soulmate: Romeo Aster. (A merlin BBC rewrite with an original character in the middle)

entry.title: The Holy Grail
entry.summary:
Author: xKiller_Queenx

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,741Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 26

Summary: Worthy kings get worthy tombs. Great kings get desperate attempts to be preserved in a magical eternal slumber. Legendary kings might never really die. Merlin has been a lot of things over the past millennium, but most importantly a scholar obsessed with finding his Once and Future King.It is but in the 21st century that he comes across a young Virginian boy with equally ambitious dreams. The thing that made Merlin look twice weren't his impossible dreams -anyone could dream- but his succes. If Gansey could do the impossible, if he could find Glendower's lost tomb, surely he can help Merlin on his quest to find King Arthur.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Arthur's desire
entry.summary:
Author: Tips_for_tat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,364Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 67

Summary: “Breathe, Merlin. Relax, and this will go a whole lot easier.”Merlin took in deep, fast breaths, attempting to will his anus to relax, but it was no use. The cock inside him felt like it was going to break him in two, and the burning sensation of his asshole being stretched by Arthur didn't get better.“Arthur, please, it’s too much," Merlin pleaded, but the King didn’t listen. All Arthur knew, was that the sensation of Merlin’s tight virgin hole felt heavenly around him, and that he wanted more. It seems the porn is developing plot. The whole thing takes place during no particular time except Arthur is king and doesn't know about Merlin's magic. He is presumably (?) not married to Gwen.

entry.title: The Dragon Knight and the Dragonlord
entry.summary:
Author: TheRailroadWarlock

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,551Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 245

Summary: Uther abandons Arthur at birth. He remains in Tintagel and is raised by a good Nimueh and educated by Catha warriors. The forgotten prince becomes a talented fighter, but he remains lonely and unloved. He is kind and noble, and without Uther's influence he never becomes a prat. A new prophecy emerges, one that still involves Emrys. Once of age, Arthur leaves Tintagel and joins with Emrys; together, they discover their shared destiny. This story is more about character than action. It is about a journey to find purpose and love.

entry.title: Reign of Bloody Time
entry.summary:
Author: BadAshWolf

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,916Chapters: 6/20Kudos: 14

Summary: For years, he carved lines into the earth and runes into his own skin. Now, it is time to crack both open and drag the future back to his King. But, as warned in the days of old, nothing is brought back without a cost. He is a king-maker who has outlived his sovereign; a warlock who has finally stopped bartering with words and started bartering with existence. He will pay any price if it means his heart never goes where he cannot follow him again. Merlin burrows to a past that hasn't yet bled, and is no longer the bumbling servant Camelot remembers. He is something older, hungrier, and powerful beyond measure. This time, Arthur will not just wear a crown; Merlin will carve him into a god to match his own dark divinity. And if it takes a little blood to bind them together, to ensure what he is owed, who he earned, then Merlin will gladly teach his prince how to thirst for it. A long time-travel fix-it, a terrible and magnificent Merlin, an Arthur remade, and the breathless cost of devotion.

entry.title: Would You Tell Me Why
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,584Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 62

Summary: Merlin and Arthur have been together for two years. So, when Arthur finally got up the courage to propose, the last thing he expected was to hear the word no. What he really didn’t expect was that Merlin wouldn’t even explain why he won’t marry him. Obviously, Merlin’s magic wasn’t the only secret he had been keeping from Arthur all these years. But there is little time to solve his relationship woes as a new king who has just ascended to the throne in a neighboring country has demanded immediate audience in Camelot.

entry.title: Professor Emrys
entry.summary:
Author: Sophthenerd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,654Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 365

Summary: What if Merlin was best friends with the Marauders but left for an internship just after school ended. What happens when he returns years later and learns what happened to his friends while he was gone.This is my first fic so it might be a little choppy. For some context all 5 seasons of Merlin are canon in this and this takes place while Merlin is waiting for Arthur to rise from the lake of Avalon. Books one and two of Harry Potter are the same and the story starts off just before book three.

entry.title: only fools want to be great
entry.summary:
Author: shatteredwriters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,443Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 61

Summary: “For you, sire.” The woman said in a voice high and melodic. “As a token of our appreciation.”In her palm lay a smooth, black stone, perfectly round, golden tendrils like lightning bolts racing across the surface.Arthur raised his eyebrows.“It’s…lovely.”The old woman held the stone out to the prince. As he reached for it, she seized his wrist with her other hand, forcefully pushing the stone into his palm. Startled, Arthur tried to yank his hand away but she held firm.“It is for luck, sire.” Her gaze transfixed the prince, and he could neither move nor speak. “May it bring you the fortune you deserve.” A mysterious gift leads Arthur into a fight for his life.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: You were the one to teach me how to use knives: Vol 5
entry.summary:
Author: Obsessedwithfanfiction

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,869Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 68

Summary: Morgana's memory curse is still in place, but Leon's no longer the only person suspicious of her. Gwen's got a mystery to solve and a long-lost brother to deal with. Morgana's determined to get closer to Merlin again to try and find out how long he's been hiding his magic from her. Meanwhile Merlin's just flattered to be receiving a Lady's attention, though with Gwaine coming back into his life, that might not be the only attention he's receiving. And Arthur's struggling his way back through his character growth and what kind of King he wants to be...

  • did ya miss me
  • I am going to try and update every 3 weeks ish on a Friday but it will be dependent on internet connection

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,751Chapters: 16/18Kudos: 581

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,385Chapters: 6/11Kudos: 10

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

entry.title: 5 Times Someone Underestimated Merlin
entry.summary:
Author: GPTwrites (craaazyaboutMalfoy)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,392Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 212

Summary: + 1 Time Someone Saw Exactly Who He Was Everyone knows Camelot has an all-powerful Court Sorcerer. Not everyone knows who it is, though.And when they run into humble, bumbling Merlin... well, let's just say there are misunderstandings all around.

entry.title: Some and Now None of You
entry.summary:
Author: Isthisusernameavailableornot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 206,156Chapters: 63/65Kudos: 2,098

Summary: "Let him think I hate him. If that’ll stop him from risking his neck for me over and over again, then it’s a sacrifice I don’t have to think twice about." — Arthur finds out Merlin has magic. He also finds out how often Merlin risked his life for him and so, he does the only thing he can think of to protect him: banishment. Hurt and angry, Merlin leaves and swears to not look back. But, when two years pass and Morgana shows up at Merlin’s door, urging him to fill Gaius’ position as Court Physician, Merlin agrees. He really doesn’t know why, but Arthur is sure Merlin would do just about anything to get on his nerves. Unprepared for the shock of seeing Merlin back in the castle, Arthur is forced to speed along his plans to lift the ban on magic. But between stubborn councilors, a mysterious plague, a still angry Merlin, and Morgana being Morgana, Arthur is fairly certain he’ll lose his mind before the first year of his reign even ends.

  • Rape/Non-Con

entry.title: Where might someone hear this from?
entry.summary:
Author: WheatReceipt

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,297Chapters: 10/16Kudos: 123

Summary: A formidable creature of mythology destined to kill Arthur, or die trying. So why's it chasing its tail in the middle of Gaius' storeroom?“Cath palug.” Merlin looks up from the stale scraps of bread he’s trying to convince himself he wants to eat, staring blankly back at Gaius. “You what?”

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 138,599Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,988Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
